productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Blue Response Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteThe adidas Response Cushion 20, a running shoe, features a Torsion system in the midsole for enhanced stability and adiPrene cushioning. A high tech running machine hidden under a simple design, the durability of the Adidas Response Cushion 20 is driven by the trademark AdiWear system in the outsole. Product DetailsBlue and white shoe with mesh upper, central lace-ups, synthetic leather overlays, reinforced overlay over the heel cup, over toe box and midfoot region Meshed and padded inner and tongueRubber midsole with adiPrene cushioning at the midfoot areaRaised heel, decoupled heel, impact lines to distribute shock, suction points all over the heel in blown leather and outsole reinforced to the upperMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
